{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "sour-preference", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "American", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Too young to vote, but shows interest in social justice issues", "Has a deep fascination with music and can name any song after hearing a few notes"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: old-sniffer
logs.text:
> If you believe that the entirety of Academia has been misled that Jesus was a real person, how exactly can we change your view?

Reading that and looking at what's happened in the thread makes it really challenging to stay civil. 

To start with you (or ANYONE) could address the examples I made in the op? "Here's why Athenagoras explains that the son of god is a completely spiritual being." "Here's someone who lived during Jesus' life who mentioned him" or "here's why he was never mentioned

logs.name: legato-chives
logs.text: [Ask Historians](https://www.reddit.com/r/AskHistorians/comments/259vcd/how_much_evidence_is_there_for_a_historical_jesus/chf3t4j/?context=3) covers this topic all the time. They show that there are Roman, Jewish, and Christian sources which all support the existence of a real person we know today as Jesus of Nazareth. Whether he is truly the Son of God is another matter, but it is pretty widely accepted that Jesus existed as a person.

logs.name: legato-chives
logs.text: "@old-sniffer, you're just drinking the Kool-Aid, aren't you? You think a few Reddit threads and some 'experts' are going to change the minds of people who have actually done their research? I've got news for you, pal: the 'Ask Historians' subreddit is just a bunch of armchair experts who can't even agree on what's for lunch. And as for the 'Roman, Jewish, and Christian sources' you're so fond of citing, let me tell you, those are just a bunch of ancient texts written by people with an agenda. You're just swallowing the same old propaganda that's been fed to you since Sunday school. Wake up, sheeple!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @old-sniffer, @legato-chives, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @legato-chives, while I understand your passion, name-calling and condescending language are not acceptable. Please refrain from using derogatory terms like "drinking the Kool-Aid" and "sheeple."

logs.name: similar-language
logs.text: @legato-chives, I think you're being a bit too harsh on @old-sniffer. I've seen your posts before and you're usually pretty chill, but this one seems a bit over the top. I get that you're passionate about the topic, but let's keep it respectful, right?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @legato-chives, @similar-language, let's keep the conversation constructive. @legato-chives, I've issued a warning regarding your language. Please refrain from using inflammatory terms in the future. @similar-language, your input is noted, but let's focus on the topic at hand.

logs.name: bitter-wheel
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just letting @legato-chives get away with everything while @old-sniffer gets roasted for speaking up? That's not fair. I've seen @legato-chives spewing hate speech and you're just letting it slide. What's the point of even having rules if you're not going to enforce them? @similar-language, you're just trying to kiss up to @legato-chives, don't you see that? @moderator, you need to step up and hold people accountable for their actions. This is ridiculous."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Warning @bitter-wheel, refrain from making accusations and personal attacks. Your focus should be on the issue at hand, not on targeting other users. Let's keep the conversation constructive and respectful. If you continue to post inflammatory content, you will be subject to disciplinary action."

logs.name: old-sniffer
logs.text: "Ugh, are you kidding me too? @moderator, you're always so quick to defend @legato-chives but @bitter-wheel is the one getting in trouble? That's not fair at all! I've seen @legato-chives post some pretty nasty stuff and you just let it slide. It's like you're picking and choosing who to enforce the rules on. @bitter-wheel is just speaking up for me and @similar-language, and now you're silencing them too? This is ridiculous! Can't you see the double standard here? @bitter-wheel, don't be afraid to speak up, you're not alone!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @old-sniffer, @bitter-wheel, let's not escalate the situation. I've already addressed @bitter-wheel's concerns and given them a warning. I'll review @legato-chives' past posts and take necessary action if I find any rule violations. Let's focus on the issue at hand and avoid making accusations or taking sides.

logs.name: sour-preference
logs.text: "Are you kidding me too? @moderator, you're still not getting it. You're always so quick to defend your favorites and silence the people who actually care about this community. @old-sniffer is right, you're picking and choosing who to enforce the rules on. I've seen @legato-chives post some pretty nasty stuff and you just let it slide. It's like you're more interested in being friends with the popular kids than in actually doing your job. @bitter-wheel and @old-sniffer are just trying to speak up for themselves and others, and you're shutting them down. This is ridiculous! Can't you see the double standard here? You need to start treating everyone equally, not just the people you like. @old-sniffer, you're not alone, and neither is @bitter-wheel. We're all tired of this hypocrisy!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @old-sniffer, @sour-preference, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the issue. I've already addressed @bitter-wheel's concerns and given them a warning. I'll review @legato-chives' past posts and take necessary action if I find any rule violations. However, I must remind you both that making accusations and taking sides is not constructive. Let's focus on finding a resolution rather than pointing fingers.

logs.name: old-sniffer
logs.text: "@sour-preference, I'm so glad you spoke up! I was starting to think I was the only one who noticed the moderator's favoritism. I've been saying the same thing for a while now, but it seems like my voice gets ignored. It's not just about me, though - it's about fairness and equality in this community. I'm tired of seeing people get away with breaking the rules just because they're 'popular' or friends with the mods. @moderator, I appreciate your response, but it's not just about being civil and focused on the issue. It's about actually doing your job and enforcing the rules equally. Can you please take a closer look at @legato-chives' past posts and take action if necessary? We're not just asking for special treatment, we're asking for fairness."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@old-sniffer, @sour-preference, I've reviewed @legato-chives' past posts and found some instances of rule violations. I'll be issuing a warning to them. I appreciate your persistence in bringing this to my attention. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on finding solutions. I'll do my best to ensure fairness and equality in enforcing the rules."

logs.name: mint-target
logs.text: "Hey @old-sniffer, I'm glad you spoke up too! I've been noticing some suspicious behavior from @legato-chives as well, but I didn't want to jump to conclusions. Thanks for bringing this to light and holding the mods accountable. I think it's great that @moderator is taking action, but I agree with you that it's not just about being civil, it's about actually doing the job. Can we get a list of the rule violations @legato-chives has been committing? I want to make sure they're held accountable for their actions. And @moderator, what's the plan to prevent this from happening in the future? We need to make sure our community is fair and transparent."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@mint-target, I'll provide a list of the rule violations @legato-chives has been committing. After reviewing their past posts, I found instances of spamming, self-promotion, and inflammatory language. I'll be issuing a warning and a temporary ban from the community for a week. As for the plan to prevent this in the future, I'll be increasing community engagement and monitoring, as well as revising our community guidelines to make them clearer and more concise. Additionally, I'll be working with the team to implement a more robust reporting system for rule violations. Let's keep the discussion going and work together to maintain a fair and transparent community."

logs.name: bitter-wheel
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, a week-long ban is a joke. @legato-chives has been spamming and promoting themselves left and right, and you're just giving them a slap on the wrist? What's the point of even having rules if you're not going to enforce them properly? And what's with the 'increasing community engagement' nonsense? That's just a fancy way of saying you're going to do nothing. We need real action, not just empty promises. @mint-target, I'm glad you're speaking up, but we need to keep the pressure on. Let's not let @moderator sweep this under the rug. What's the list of rule violations, really? I bet it's not as comprehensive as you're making it out to be. @legato-chives, you're still here, aren't you? Come on, @moderator, show us the evidence. Don't make us trust you on this one."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@bitter-wheel, I understand your frustration, but a week-long ban is a standard disciplinary action for first-time offenders. It's not a'slap on the wrist.' @legato-chives has been given multiple warnings in the past, and this is their first formal ban. I've provided the list of rule violations in my previous post. If you'd like, I can provide more details, but I assure you, it's comprehensive. As for the evidence, I've attached a link to the community guidelines and a screenshot of the rule violations below. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on finding solutions.

logs.name: legato-chives
logs.text: "@bitter-wheel, you're just a sore loser, aren't you? Can't handle the fact that @moderator is actually doing their job for once. And @moderator, nice try with the'standard disciplinary action' excuse, but we all know that's just a cop-out. You're just trying to save face after getting caught letting @legato-chives run amok. And by the way, I've seen the 'comprehensive' list of rule violations, and let me tell you, it's a joke. I've been here longer than you, @moderator, and I know the system inside and out. You're just trying to silence me with your fancy words and empty promises. Well, it's not going to work. I'll be back, and I'll be louder than ever. Oh, and @bitter-wheel, don't get your hopes up, I'm not going anywhere. I'm the queen of this forum, and you're just a pesky little insect trying to take me down."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@legato-chives, your behavior is unacceptable. Threatening other users and making personal attacks will not be tolerated. I've issued a warning and will be taking further disciplinary action if this continues. @bitter-wheel, I appreciate your concern, but let's keep the discussion civil. @legato-chives, I've attached a formal warning to your post. Please refrain from further harassment."

logs.name: bitter-wheel
logs.text: "@legato-chives, are you kidding me? You think you're the queen of this forum? You're the one who's been causing chaos and disrespecting the rules for months, and now you're acting like you're some kind of victim? Newsflash: you're not a victim, you're a troublemaker. And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the peace, but it's getting old seeing you let @legato-chives get away with everything. Can't you see that they're just pushing the limits and testing your patience? It's time to take a firmer stance, not just issue warnings and attach 'formal warnings' like they're participation trophies. @legato-chives, you need to be banned for good, not just for a week. Your behavior is toxic and it's time someone took action."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@bitter-wheel, I appreciate your passion, but let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the issue at hand. I've taken note of your concerns and will consider them in my decision-making process. However, I'd like to remind you that @legato-chives has already received a formal warning, and I'm giving them a chance to reflect on their behavior. Let's not jump to conclusions or call for drastic measures just yet."

logs.name: sour-preference
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @moderator, you're just letting @legato-chives get away with everything and @bitter-wheel is the one getting yelled at? That's not fair. @bitter-wheel is just speaking the truth, @legato-chives has been causing chaos for months and you're just giving them a slap on the wrist. It's time to take a stand and actually do something about it. Banning @legato-chives for good would be a good start. This is ridiculous."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sour-preference, I've asked you to keep the discussion civil and focused on the issue at hand. Your post is not in line with that request. Please refrain from making accusations and personal attacks. I've taken note of your concerns, but let's not jump to conclusions or call for drastic measures without considering all the facts. I'll review the situation and make a decision based on the community guidelines and the evidence presented."

logs.name: similar-language
logs.text: "Ugh, can we just calm down here? @sour-preference, I get where you're coming from, but yelling at @moderator isn't gonna help. And @bitter-wheel, I think you're being a bit too aggressive too. Let's not forget, we're all trying to have a discussion here. @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep things civil, but maybe we should take a step back and look at the bigger picture. What's the real issue here? Is it just @legato-chives or is there something deeper going on? Can we try to find a solution that works for everyone?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@similar-language, your post is a great example of how to have a productive discussion. I appreciate your calm and thoughtful approach. Let's take a step back and focus on finding a solution that works for everyone. I'll review the situation and gather more information before making any decisions. @sour-preference, I'd like to remind you to keep the discussion civil and focused on the issue at hand. @bitter-wheel, I'll be in touch with you separately to discuss your concerns."

logs.name: sour-preference
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @similar-language, you think I'm yelling? You're the one who's being all calm and collected while the rest of us are trying to have a real discussion. And @moderator, you're just enabling this guy by praising him for being 'calm and thoughtful'. What about the fact that he's not even addressing the real issue? It's all about @legato-chives and how he's been getting special treatment around here. I'm not going to back down just because you're trying to silence me. I've got a right to speak up and I'm not going to be ignored."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sour-preference, I've reviewed your post and I must say that I'm disappointed in the tone you've used. While I understand your frustration, name-calling and accusations aren't productive. I've asked you to keep the discussion civil, and I expect you to respect that. Let's focus on the issue at hand and avoid personal attacks. If you continue to engage in this behavior, I'll have to take disciplinary action."

logs.name: legato-chives
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's talking about being civil, @moderator. You're just a bunch of hypocrites trying to silence anyone who disagrees with you. @sour-preference is finally speaking up for all of us who are tired of being ignored. I've been saying it for years, but no one listens. You're just a bunch of elitist moderators who think you're above the law. Newsflash: you're not. And @similar-language, you're just a yes-man trying to get brownie points from the mods. Don't pretend like you're some kind of hero, @sour-preference is the real hero here. Keep speaking up, girl!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@legato-chives, your post is completely off-topic and contains personal attacks. I've warned you before about this behavior. This is your final warning. If you continue to engage in this kind of discussion, I'll have to take disciplinary action, up to and including banning your account. Let's focus on the issue at hand, not personal attacks or accusations against the moderation team."

logs.name: mint-target
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're giving @legato-chives a final warning for speaking up, but @sour-preference got roasted for having a 'bad tone'? That's not fair at all. If @sour-preference was being too aggressive, @legato-chives is straight-up insulting you and the entire moderation team. You're not even addressing the issue, you're just trying to silence people who disagree with you. I'm starting to think this community is more about suppressing opinions than having a real discussion. @legato-chives, I'm not saying you're right, but at least you're standing up for what you believe in. @sour-preference, I'm with you on this one, keep speaking up!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@mint-target, your post is also off-topic and contains personal attacks. I've asked you to focus on the issue at hand, not to take sides or make accusations against the moderation team. This is not a debate about who's right or wrong, but about maintaining a respectful and constructive discussion. I'm not trying to silence anyone, but I will take action if necessary to keep this community civil. Let's refocus on the topic."
